mxCell.value: PROCESS_STATUS_PHASE_ID: SMALLINT NOT NULL
PROCESS_CREATED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
USER_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
ADMIN_STARTED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
PROCESS_STATUS_PHASE_ORDER: SMALLINT NOT NULL
PROCESS_STATUS_PHASE_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
PROCESS_TYPE_PHASE_IS_OPTIONAL: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
PROCESS_TYPE_PHASE_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
PROCESS_STATUS_IS_FINAL: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
PROCESS_STATUS_IS_DEFAULT: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
PROCESS_STATUS_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
PROCESS_TYPE_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
PROCESS_PHASE_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
DOCUMENT_ID: UUID NOT NULL
UPDATED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
